subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1912-12-20 in London
subcodes.first_line: Since we discerned no fruit from the counsel we gave our countrymen, nor could we find a hearing ear among them, we felt it necessary to turn our attention to the West
subcodes.first_line_orig: چون از نصیحت بهموطنان نتیجهئ‌ی ندیدیم و گوش شنوائی نجستیم لابد توجّه بغرب نمودیم
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @call to action, @East and West; communication between East and West
